steps.title: Find the appositive boundary
steps.content: The phrase a fictionalized account of the lives of the Mirabal sisters describes the novel and is supplementary. The comma after the title opens that descriptive phrase, so another comma is needed after sisters before the main verb phrase continues.

steps.title: Close the description
steps.content: Choice A adds an unnecessary and. Choice B also adds and while failing to close the supplementary phrase. Choice D leaves the descriptive phrase running into can serve without punctuation. A comma after sisters closes the description cleanly. The answer is C.
